utterances.text: Since I have been waiting four women , that is four , one higher than the number of centimeters that I am dilated , have come and gone with their babies !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: And if you bring in one woman and she has her baby before me I am going to sue you !

emotion_cause.span: 10_you bring in one woman and she has her baby before me

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Not this hospital , I am going to sue you !

emotion_cause.span: 10_you bring in one woman and she has her baby before me

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: And my husband he is a lawyer !

emotion_cause.span: 10_you bring in one woman and she has her baby before me

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Go get back on that case honey !

utterances.speaker: Nurse
utterances.text: I do not think the next patient is very far along .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay , well then bring her in .
